question.label: Support needed
question.name: What would help you make the next few weeks feel more deliberate?
question.description: Finds the smallest useful support without reopening diagnosis or blame.

answer: If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.

assessment.note: Names precise path definition as currently missing before he can commit, signaling mild clarity deficit and some drag on steadiness.

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.
